## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One paragraph max. -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, config
- [ ] refactor — no behaviour change
- [ ] test — tests only

## Linked issue / ticket

<!-- GitHub issue # or Linear ticket URL -->
Closes #

## Changes

<!-- Bullet list of what changed and why -->
-

## Skills run

- [ ] `/ponytail-review` — ran before opening this PR
- [ ] `/security-auditor` — if touching auth, permissions, or agent-to-git code
- [ ] `/frontend-design` — if adding new UI screens
- [ ] `/atlas-agents` — if touching agent code

## Checklist

- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm typecheck` pass locally
- [ ] No `any` types introduced
- [ ] No raw SQL strings
- [ ] No hardcoded model names or API keys
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] Agent code: all agent changes have human approval
